full_text:
Xiong ?
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xiong ?. Served Liu Biao in variety of positions, worked in Guiyang for twenty one years. Xiong ? was affiliated with Liu Biao and the Shu Kingdom. Xiong ? lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
